card.title: Sign in
card.subtitle: Choose a sign-in method to continue.

notes.redirect: You'll be redirected back after login.

legal.prefix: By continuing, you agree to our

errors.title: Sign-in issue
errors.OAuthSignin: Couldn't start the sign-in flow. Please try again.
errors.OAuthCallback: Sign-in failed while validating the response. Please try again.
errors.OAuthAccountNotLinked: That account is already linked to a different sign-in method. Use the originally linked method.
errors.Default: Something went wrong. Please try again.

courseInvite.title: You were invited to a classroom
courseInvite.body: Create an account or sign in with the email that received the invitation for {resource}. You will be taken directly to the classroom afterward.

paymentRequired.title: Sign in to continue
paymentRequired.body: Sign in first so ZoeSkoul can check your access. If the course was assigned by a teacher, no personal subscription is required.

privateCourse.title: Sign in to open this private course
privateCourse.body: Sign in so ZoeSkoul can confirm that a teacher or admin assigned this course to you. Assigned courses do not require a personal subscription.

tutoringSession.title: Sign in to join this tutoring classroom
tutoringSession.body: Create an account or sign in with the invited email. After authentication, ZoeSkoul will return you directly to the classroom you opened.

tutoringInvite.title: You were invited to a tutoring classroom
tutoringInvite.body: Create an account or sign in with the email that received the invitation for {resource}. You will be taken directly to the tutoring classroom afterward.
